exercises.title: Inspect a Git DAG
exercises.description: Use git log or git graph tools to understand how commits flow into main.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can explain the shape of the repository history.

exercises.title: Run a Tiny CI Job
exercises.description: Lint or test a project locally using the same commands your CI would run.
exercises.expected_outcome: You have a single repeatable command for local and CI validation.

exercises.title: Add Build Caching
exercises.description: Configure your pipeline or Docker build to reuse unchanged dependencies.
exercises.expected_outcome: Subsequent builds complete faster with cache hits.

exercises.title: Add a Canary Gate
exercises.description: Release a small fraction of traffic and make promotion depend on health metrics.
exercises.expected_outcome: A bad release can be stopped before full exposure.

exercises.title: Build a Delivery Pipeline
exercises.description: Create a pipeline that tests, packages, and promotes the same artifact through environments.
exercises.expected_outcome: Artifact promotion is repeatable and auditable end to end.

exercises.title: Document a Release Process
exercises.description: Write a release and rollback runbook with ownership, checks, and failure steps.
exercises.expected_outcome: You have a concrete operational procedure for safe releases.
